pairs.a_text: Alex Hormozi asserts that the only way to become more successful than most people is to be willing to do something most people are unwilling to do, and that complaining about absent results from absent work is self-contradictory.
pairs.b_text: Alex Hormozi claims that the stretch between who you are and who you need to become to handle your current struggle is the definitional source of growth pain, and that growth cannot occur without accepting this cost.
